_note_plan: Routing-factorization ablations for the current ChannelThermal enhanced HONF setup. Use with configs/unified_forward_channelthermal_template.json.
_note_baseline: Compare against Run_0009-style settings where use_hyper_value_context=false, H-routed pairwise kernel is enabled, A_mh is learned, and query-to-H attention is learned.

ablations.name: routing_factorization_uniform_Amh
ablations.notes: Replace module-to-hyperedge assignment with A_mh(m,k)=1/K for present modules. Tests whether learned hyperedge module grouping matters.

ablations.name: routing_factorization_uniform_alpha_qk
ablations.notes: Replace query-to-H attention with alpha_qk=1/K. Tests whether query-specific hyperedge selection matters.

ablations.name: normal_routing
ablations.notes: Replace query-to-H attention with alpha_qk=1/K. Tests whether query-specific hyperedge selection matters.
